There's usually fuel...when I went by, I didn't want to pay with the app, but it wasn't working...

reviews.comment:
Malisima nunca tiene combustible, mala atención, es mejor hacer 30 km e ir a la YPF de Catriel.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, never has fuel, bad service, it's better to go 30 km and go to the YPF in Catriel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURod3BMUll3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar y el playero que estaba en ese momento con muy poca predisposición para atender quisimos pagar con QR y no funcionaba el cartón de pago  de muy mala gana para contestar y solucionar las cosas !no era su día !

(Translated by Google)
We went to load and the beach attendant who was there at that time was very unwilling to help us, we wanted to pay with QR and the payment card didn't work, he was very reluctant to answer and solve things! It wasn't his day!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoZ3N5eFJnEAE
